# UC-18.4.7 · Nexus Dashboard Orchestrator Cross-Fabric Consistency

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Availability, Change, Configuration &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We align the central playbook that spans your halls with the copy each site truly runs, so nobody inherits different traffic rules by accident. We raise a calm flag before one wing behaves unlike its twins.*

---

## Description

Correlates Nexus Dashboard Orchestrator evidence—schema and template policy-deployment-status per site (`failed`, `stale`, `modified`, `not_deployed`), deploy/undeploy audit records, managed-site connectivity snapshots, platform health of orchestration services, and appliance syslog—to expose cross-site drift, partially applied stretches, APIC push rejections, and inter-site policy gaps before traffic asymmetry manifests.

## Value

Change auditors and network automation leads get a tamper-resistant ledger that ties orchestrator intent to per-site reality, shortens mean-time-to-recovery when a follower fabric rejects templates, and prevents silent policy skew across active/active data centers where CAB records alone miss partial deployments.

## Implementation

(1) Land all five NDO sourcetypes via Splunkbase 1546 against documented `/api/v1/*` paths plus syslog. (2) Schedule the correlation SPL with maintenance and onboarding lookups. (3) Wire alerts to NDO schema drilldowns and UC-18.1.17 health context.

## Evidence

Saved search `ndo_schema_consistency_watch_v2`, Dashboard Studio workbook `DC_NDO_CrossSite_Consistency_18_4_7`, and weekly CSV snapshots archived to `network_evidence` with 13-month retention.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Lab shows cisco:ndo:deploy_status with deployment_status=stale for template CORE-VRF on two sites while cisco:ndo:audit records deploy_failed within the same hour; SPL returns P1_policy_split with sites_touched=2 and signal=deploy_gap.

### Negative scenario

Maintenance CSV lists the same schema_key with valid_until covering the search window and ndo_change_ticket matching approved CAB; suppression macro filters the row so no alert fires though raw events exist.

## Detailed Implementation

### Prerequisites
- Nexus Dashboard appliances (ND-STARTER, ND-3K, virtual OVA) host the Cisco Nexus Dashboard Orchestrator (NDO, formerly MSO) keeping schema/template intent synchronized across multiple APIC sites and NDFC-managed NX-OS fabrics. This UC is not UC-18.4.1 NDI anomaly monitoring, not UC-18.4.9 Assurance score trending, and not UC-18.4.10 per-switch golden-template compliance—it focuses on policy-deployment-status parity, audit records, site reachability, platform health, and NDO syslog corroboration.
- Splunk 9.2+ or Splunk Cloud must reach GET **`https://<nd-cluster>/api/v1/schemas`**, **`/api/v1/schemas/{id}/policy-deployment-status`**, **`/api/v1/audit-records`**, **`/api/v1/sites`**, and **`/api/v1/platform/health`** over 443/tcp from Splunk collectors (Heavy Forwarders) with enterprise trust stores when proxies break TLS.
- Install cisco_dc_networking_app_for_splunk (**Splunkbase 7777**) for dashboards and macros, and Splunk REST API Modular Input (**Splunkbase 1546**) to poll orchestration JSON into **`index=cisco_dc`** with **`sourcetype=cisco:ndo:deploy_status`**, **`cisco:ndo:audit`**, **`cisco:ndo:site_status`**, **`cisco:ndo:platform`**, and **`cisco:ndo:syslog`** so Splunk can correlate stale templates with rollbacks, site islands, and worker outages.
- RBAC: grant the poller read access to orchestrator schemas, deployment status, audit streams, site inventory, and platform health—map LDAP/SAML (Site Manager, Approver) identities to API tokens in Splunk’s credential store.
- Expect roughly one deploy_status snapshot per schema×site×poll (300–900 seconds is common) plus bursts of audit rows after CAB windows; retain 90–180 days for evidence quality.

### Step 1 — Configure data collection
(1) Create a REST modular input (**Splunkbase 1546**) stanza per NDO cluster with response_type JSON, Bearer or Basic auth headers, and **`polling_interval` ≥ 300 seconds** to avoid HTTP 429 storms. Loop `GET /api/v1/schemas` to discover ids, then call **`GET /api/v1/schemas/{id}/policy-deployment-status`** for **`cisco:ndo:deploy_status`** events carrying **`schema_id`**, **`template_name`**, **`site_name`**, and **`deployment_status`** tokens (**deployed**, **not_deployed**, **modified**, **stale**, **failed**).
(2) Map **`GET /api/v1/audit-records`** into **`cisco:ndo:audit`** preserving **`action`**, **`user`**, **`status`**, **`request_id`**, and timestamps; keep camelCase aliases via FIELDALIAS pairs.
(3) Poll **`GET /api/v1/sites`** into **`cisco:ndo:site_status`** with **`connectivity`**, **`apic`**, **`version`**, and **`last_sync`** fields for Inventory-style joins.
(4) Poll **`GET /api/v1/platform/health`** into **`cisco:ndo:platform`** to detect microservices that stall deployment workers.
(5) Forward appliance syslog into **`cisco:ndo:syslog`** (SC4S or HF) focusing on deployment rejections or APIC unreachable messages.
(6) Document proxy PAC rules, token rotation cadence, and maintenance lookup paths beside CAB templates in the NetOps runbook.

### Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Run the SPL from the `spl` field on a 24-hour operations window (extend to 7 days for leadership reviews). Understanding this SPL: unlike UC-18.4.9, this query ignores Assurance composite scores and instead fuses five NDO sourcetypes so Tier-3 engineers see the same story they would trace in Orchestrator → Schemas → Policy Deployment Status while reading Audit Records for rollback causes. **`signal`** buckets symptoms (**deploy_gap**, **audit_break**, **site_island**, **control_plane**, **ndo_syslog**). **`severity`** encodes paging policy; extend regex lists when Cisco publishes new status tokens. **`playbook`** strings ride along in alert payloads to cut overnight runbook lookups.

```spl
`comment("UC-18.4.7 NDO cross-site schema/template consistency earliest=-24h")`
(index=cisco_dc OR index=network_operations OR index=cisco_network)
(
  sourcetype="cisco:ndo:deploy_status" OR sourcetype="cisco:ndo:audit"
  OR sourcetype="cisco:ndo:site_status" OR sourcetype="cisco:ndo:platform"
  OR sourcetype="cisco:ndo:syslog"
) earliest=-24h latest=now
| eval st=lower(trim(sourcetype))
| eval schema_key=trim(coalesce(schema_id,schemaId,schema_name,schemaName,"unknown_schema"))
| eval template_key=trim(coalesce(template_name,templateName,template,ndo_template,"unknown_template"))
| eval site_key=trim(lower(coalesce(site_name,siteName,site_id,managed_site,ndo_site,"unknown_site")))
| eval deploy_state=lower(trim(coalesce(deployment_status,deploy_status,policy_state,status,state,"")))
| eval site_reach=lower(trim(coalesce(connectivity,site_health,reachability,apic_sync_state,sync_status,"")))
| eval audit_action=lower(trim(coalesce(action,operation,audit_action,event_type,"")))
| eval lr=lower(_raw)
| eval bad_deploy=if(st=="cisco:ndo:deploy_status" AND match(deploy_state,"failed|error|stale|not_deployed|not\\s*deployed|modified|pending|partial|conflict"),1,0)
| eval bad_audit=if(st=="cisco:ndo:audit" AND (match(audit_action,"fail|undeploy|rollback|reject|abort|error") OR match(lr,"schema\\s*conflict|template\\s*drift|policy\\s*mismatch")),1,0)
| eval bad_site=if(st=="cisco:ndo:site_status" AND match(site_reach,"unreachable|disconnected|sync_failed|out_of_sync|degraded|down|lost"),1,0)
| eval bad_plat=if(st=="cisco:ndo:platform" AND match(lr,"service_down|not_ready|cassandra|zookeeper|postgres|api\\s*unavailable"),1,0)
| eval bad_syslog=if(st=="cisco:ndo:syslog" AND (like(lr,"%deployment%fail%") OR like(lr,"%policy%push%") OR like(lr,"%apic%reject%") OR like(lr,"%inter-site%")),1,0)
| eval signal=case(bad_deploy==1,"deploy_gap",bad_audit==1,"audit_break",bad_site==1,"site_island",bad_plat==1,"control_plane",bad_syslog==1,"ndo_syslog",1=1,"watch")
| where signal!="watch"
| stats dc(site_key) AS sites_touched, latest(_time) AS last_evidence, values(deploy_state) AS deploy_states, values(audit_action) AS audit_actions, values(site_reach) AS reach_states, count AS evidence_hits BY schema_key template_key signal
| eval deploy_blob=lower(mvjoin(deploy_states," "))
| eval severity=case(signal=="site_island","P1_site_unreachable",signal=="deploy_gap" AND match(deploy_blob,"failed|stale|not_deployed|conflict|error"),"P1_policy_split",signal=="deploy_gap","P2_template_gap",signal=="audit_break","P2_audit_break",signal=="control_plane","P2_ndo_platform",1=1,"P3_syslog_confirm")
| eval playbook=case(
    severity=="P1_site_unreachable","Restore reachability on orchestrator paths; validate certs before redeploy.",
    severity=="P1_policy_split","Open policy-deployment-status; redeploy after clearing controller conflicts.",
    severity=="P2_template_gap","Diff stretched vs local bindings; CAB-align templates.",
    severity=="P2_audit_break","Trace audit-records; check overlapping schema objects.",
    severity=="P2_ndo_platform","Follow cluster health steps; recycle microservice if advised.",
    1=1,"Correlate syslog with deploy_status to avoid noise.")
| table schema_key,template_key,signal,severity,sites_touched,deploy_states,audit_actions,reach_states,evidence_hits,last_evidence,playbook
| sort severity,-evidence_hits
| head 200
```

**Pipeline walkthrough**
- Stage 1 scopes `index=cisco_dc` (or regional shards) and five NDO sourcetypes across **24h**—extend to **168h** for MTTR reviews.
- Stage 2 normalizes **`schema_key`**, **`template_key`**, **`site_key`** to absorb camelCase vs snake_case exports.
- Stage 3 sets **`bad_*`** flags from Cisco deployment vocabulary—adjust regex after TAC advisories add tokens.
- Stage 4 deduplicates with **`stats … BY schema_key template_key signal`** while retaining **`sites_touched`**.
- Stage 5 uses **`deploy_blob`** from **`mvjoin`** to raise **`P1_policy_split`** when failed, stale, not_deployed, or conflict tokens co-exist.

Schedule alerting every **15 minutes** with **30-minute** **`schema_key`/`template_key` throttles** for P2+; page P1 unless **`ndo_maintenance_allow.csv`** covers the change window.

### Step 3 — Validate
(1) NDO UI path Orchestrator → Schemas → select schema → Policy Deployment Status grid: compare per-site columns to **`deploy_states`** in Splunk at the same hour bucket (confirm UTC alignment).
(2) Export Audit Records CSV and verify `stats count by request_id` for **`cisco:ndo:audit`** tracks within sampling tolerance.
(3) `timechart span=15m count by sourcetype` should show all five feeds; flatlines longer than **2×** the poll interval imply REST silence—check splunkd rest logs on the host executing **1546**.
(4) **`cisco:ndo:site_status`** connectivity must align with synthetic HTTPS curl from the collector; fix DNS/NAT before declaring fabric down.
(5) Cross-check **UC-18.1.17** multisite health—when underlay routing is red, treat NDO indicators as secondary until ISIS/BGP stabilizes.
(6) Spot-check two templates (one stretched EPG case, one site-local VRF) ensuring **`template_key`** spelling matches GUI case sensitivity.


### Step 4 — Operationalize
(1) Executive row: multi-series timechart of **`P1`** counts by **`schema_key`** with CAB milestone annotations.
(2) Operator table: sort **`severity`**, **`-evidence_hits`**, **`last_evidence`**; drilldown launches saved searches filtered on **`schema_key`** with link to **UC-18.1.17** context.
(3) Wire suppression macro **`ndo_consistency_suppress`** consuming **`ndo_maintenance_allow.csv`** and **`dr_drill_ack.csv`** filters after primary `where` clauses.
(4) Restrict **`index=cisco_dc`** NDO sourcetypes to automation roles; SEDCMD scrub secrets from **`_raw`**.
(5) Archive weekly CSV exports to **`network_evidence`** (13-month retention) for auditors reviewing partial deployments.


### Step 5 — Visualization, alerting, and troubleshooting
Visualization — Primary table of **`schema_key`**, **`template_key`**, **`signal`**, **`severity`**, **`sites_touched`**, **`playbook`**. Add heatmap of signal×site_key after mvexpand, timechart of signal counts overlaid with **`cisco:ndo:platform`** errors, and single-value open **`P1`** count for the last 4h using Splunkbase 7777 styling cues.

Alerting — **`P1_site_unreachable`** pages fabric anchor + automation lead with deeplink URIs from `/api/v1/sites`. **`P1_policy_split`** pages schema owner when **`sites_touched`** ≥ 2 and **`deploy_blob`** shows failed/conflict states. Route P2 alerts to **`#net-automation-alerts`** with **`playbook`** text only when maintenance lookups do not match. Throttle **`schema_key`** (30m) and **`site_key`** (15m) to absorb transient blips.

Troubleshooting
- No `cisco:ndo:deploy_status` events → modular input disabled, HTTP 401, or wrong sourcetype routing; rotate tokens and confirm role scopes.
- **`schema_key=unknown_schema`** dominates → JSON path drift after NDO upgrade; refresh **`props`/`transforms`** and **`spath`** tests.
- HTTP 429 spikes → raise **`polling_interval`** or shard schemas across multiple inputs with jitter.
- Syslog-only detections → tighten **`like()`** clauses or accept dashboard-only routing for **`P3_syslog_confirm`**.
- Duplicate **`evidence_hits`** → duplicate REST/HEC ingest; summary-index dedupe keys before paging.
- Scores/health mismatches vs UI → compare friendly labels to APIC UUIDs via CMDB lookups—collisions inflate **`sites_touched`**.

## SPL

```spl
`comment("UC-18.4.7 NDO cross-site schema/template consistency earliest=-24h")`
(index=cisco_dc OR index=network_operations OR index=cisco_network)
(
  sourcetype="cisco:ndo:deploy_status" OR sourcetype="cisco:ndo:audit"
  OR sourcetype="cisco:ndo:site_status" OR sourcetype="cisco:ndo:platform"
  OR sourcetype="cisco:ndo:syslog"
) earliest=-24h latest=now
| eval st=lower(trim(sourcetype))
| eval schema_key=trim(coalesce(schema_id,schemaId,schema_name,schemaName,"unknown_schema"))
| eval template_key=trim(coalesce(template_name,templateName,template,ndo_template,"unknown_template"))
| eval site_key=trim(lower(coalesce(site_name,siteName,site_id,managed_site,ndo_site,"unknown_site")))
| eval deploy_state=lower(trim(coalesce(deployment_status,deploy_status,policy_state,status,state,"")))
| eval site_reach=lower(trim(coalesce(connectivity,site_health,reachability,apic_sync_state,sync_status,"")))
| eval audit_action=lower(trim(coalesce(action,operation,audit_action,event_type,"")))
| eval lr=lower(_raw)
| eval bad_deploy=if(st=="cisco:ndo:deploy_status" AND match(deploy_state,"failed|error|stale|not_deployed|not\\s*deployed|modified|pending|partial|conflict"),1,0)
| eval bad_audit=if(st=="cisco:ndo:audit" AND (match(audit_action,"fail|undeploy|rollback|reject|abort|error") OR match(lr,"schema\\s*conflict|template\\s*drift|policy\\s*mismatch")),1,0)
| eval bad_site=if(st=="cisco:ndo:site_status" AND match(site_reach,"unreachable|disconnected|sync_failed|out_of_sync|degraded|down|lost"),1,0)
| eval bad_plat=if(st=="cisco:ndo:platform" AND match(lr,"service_down|not_ready|cassandra|zookeeper|postgres|api\\s*unavailable"),1,0)
| eval bad_syslog=if(st=="cisco:ndo:syslog" AND (like(lr,"%deployment%fail%") OR like(lr,"%policy%push%") OR like(lr,"%apic%reject%") OR like(lr,"%inter-site%")),1,0)
| eval signal=case(bad_deploy==1,"deploy_gap",bad_audit==1,"audit_break",bad_site==1,"site_island",bad_plat==1,"control_plane",bad_syslog==1,"ndo_syslog",1=1,"watch")
| where signal!="watch"
| stats dc(site_key) AS sites_touched, latest(_time) AS last_evidence, values(deploy_state) AS deploy_states, values(audit_action) AS audit_actions, values(site_reach) AS reach_states, count AS evidence_hits BY schema_key template_key signal
| eval deploy_blob=lower(mvjoin(deploy_states," "))
| eval severity=case(signal=="site_island","P1_site_unreachable",signal=="deploy_gap" AND match(deploy_blob,"failed|stale|not_deployed|conflict|error"),"P1_policy_split",signal=="deploy_gap","P2_template_gap",signal=="audit_break","P2_audit_break",signal=="control_plane","P2_ndo_platform",1=1,"P3_syslog_confirm")
| eval playbook=case(
    severity=="P1_site_unreachable","Restore reachability on orchestrator paths; validate certs before redeploy.",
    severity=="P1_policy_split","Open policy-deployment-status; redeploy after clearing controller conflicts.",
    severity=="P2_template_gap","Diff stretched vs local bindings; CAB-align templates.",
    severity=="P2_audit_break","Trace audit-records; check overlapping schema objects.",
    severity=="P2_ndo_platform","Follow cluster health steps; recycle microservice if advised.",
    1=1,"Correlate syslog with deploy_status to avoid noise.")
| table schema_key,template_key,signal,severity,sites_touched,deploy_states,audit_actions,reach_states,evidence_hits,last_evidence,playbook
| sort severity,-evidence_hits
| head 200
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Change.All_Changes by All_Changes.action All_Changes.object All_Changes.user
| append [ tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Inventory.All_Inventory by All_Inventory.ip All_Inventory.host ]
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

(1) Table of schema_key, template_key, signal, severity, playbook; (2) Heatmap signal × site; (3) Timeline of signals overlaid with platform errors; (4) Single-value open P1 count; (5) Treemap of sites_touched share for major incidents.

## Known False Positives

**maintenance_template_repush** — Approved **CAB** windows intentionally redeploy **templates** site-by-site, so **not_deployed** appears transiently on followers while the lead **schema** finishes; **suppress** **P2** rows when **`ndo_change_ticket`** matches **`inputlookup ndo_maintenance_allow.csv`** and **valid_until** covers **_time**.

**greenfield_site_partial_bind** — New **fabric** registrations often show **policy-deployment-status** gaps until **`/api/v1/sites`** stabilization completes; require **`sites_touched`** ≥ **2** or **48h** age from **`lookup ndo_site_onboard.csv`** before paging **P1_policy_split**.

**apic_cli_touchup_window** — Operators sometimes patch **EPG** or **VRF** knobs directly on **APIC**, creating **modified** states that **NDO** will reconcile; cross-check **`cisco:ndo:audit`** actor **user** against **NetOps** roster and **filter** **`severity!="P1"`** unless **`playbook`** references genuine **inter-site** **contract** breaks.

**schema_rename_propagation_lag** — **Schema** renames traverse **sites** asynchronously; **stale** banners can clear without intervention—compare two successive **`cisco:ndo:deploy_status`** snapshots **60m** apart and **suppress** when **deploy_states** converges to **deployed**.

**poll_interval_misalignment** — **Splunkbase** **1546** inputs polling **`/api/v1/schemas/{id}/policy-deployment-status`** faster than **300s** may duplicate **HTTP** pulls; dedupe on **`schema_key`**, **`template_key`**, **`site_key`**, **`date_mday`**, **`date_hour`** before **alert** volume drives false **P2_template_gap**.

**hep_duplicate_batch_ingest** — Mis-keyed **HEC** **tokens** can double-fire identical **audit** rows after **retry** storms; cap **`evidence_hits`** escalation when **source** IP and **guid** repeat—route to **pipeline** owners, not **fabric** anchors.

**stretched_epg_quiesce** — **Disaster-recovery** rehearsals temporarily **detach** a **follower** site; **site_island** is expected—tie **`signal=site_island`** to **`lookup dr_drill_ack.csv`** and **where** **`drill_active=1`** **suppresses** **P1**.

**ndo_certificate_rotation_grace** — **TLS** rotations on **NDO** **management** interfaces produce **`cisco:ndo:platform`** flaps** unrelated to **policy**; **wrap** **P2_ndo_platform** with **`lookup cert_rotation_window.csv`** honoring **maintenance** **tokens**.
